title: Mechanical March
description: A simple modpack with create as a central focus. It removes Elytra in exchange for a configured Immsersive Aircraft to make exploration more costly but still fairly trivial.
body:
A modpack focused on Create with a few addons and CC: Tweaked with Create based recipes.

Elytras are replaced with Immersive Aircraft planes and airships configured to require much more fuel than usual and longer takeoff so runways or flat terrain is required. This is meant to make exploration more costly while still having relatively trivial and early options.
